parameters.query:
SELECT id, client_id, advertiser_id, advertiser_name, access_token
FROM tiktok_ad_accounts
WHERE account_status = 1
  AND access_token IS NOT NULL

INSERT INTO tiktok_ads (tiktok_ad_id, tiktok_campaign_id, tiktok_adgroup_id, advertiser_id, name, status, template_type, theme, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.tiktok_ad_id }}',
  '{{ $json.tiktok_campaign_id }}',
  '{{ $json.tiktok_adgroup_id }}',
  '{{ $json.advertiser_id }}',
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  '{{ $json.template_type }}',
  {{ $json.theme ? "'" + $json.theme + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (tiktok_ad_id) DO UPDATE SET
  name = EXCLUDED.name,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  template_type = EXCLUDED.template_type,
  theme = EXCLUDED.theme,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING tiktok_ad_id, advertiser_id;

INSERT INTO tiktok_ad_insights (
  tiktok_ad_id, advertiser_id, date_start, date_stop,
  spend, impressions, clicks, ctr, cpc, cpm,
  video_play_actions, video_views_p25, video_views_p50, video_views_p75, video_views_p100,
  likes, comments, shares, follows, profile_visits,
  conversions, cost_per_conversion, leads, cost_per_lead, actions_raw
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.tiktok_ad_id }}',
  '{{ $json.advertiser_id }}',
  '{{ $json.date_start }}',
  '{{ $json.date_stop }}',
  {{ $json.spend }},
  {{ $json.impressions }},
  {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.ctr }},
  {{ $json.cpc }},
  {{ $json.cpm }},
  {{ $json.video_play_actions }},
  {{ $json.video_views_p25 }},
  {{ $json.video_views_p50 }},
  {{ $json.video_views_p75 }},
  {{ $json.video_views_p100 }},
  {{ $json.likes }},
  {{ $json.comments }},
  {{ $json.shares }},
  {{ $json.follows }},
  {{ $json.profile_visits }},
  {{ $json.conversions }},
  {{ $json.cost_per_conversion !== null ? $json.cost_per_conversion : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.leads }},
  {{ $json.cost_per_lead !== null ? $json.cost_per_lead : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.actions_raw }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (tiktok_ad_id, date_start, date_stop) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, tiktok_ad_id;

INSERT INTO tiktok_placement_insights (
  tiktok_ad_id, advertiser_id, date_start, date_stop,
  placement, placement_code,
  spend, impressions, clicks, ctr, cpc, cpm,
  video_play_actions, video_views_p25, video_views_p50, video_views_p75, video_views_p100,
  likes, comments, shares, leads, cost_per_lead, actions_raw
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.tiktok_ad_id }}',
  '{{ $json.advertiser_id }}',
  '{{ $json.date_start }}',
  '{{ $json.date_stop }}',
  '{{ $json.placement }}',
  {{ $json.placement_code ? "'" + $json.placement_code + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.spend }},
  {{ $json.impressions }},
  {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.ctr }},
  {{ $json.cpc }},
  {{ $json.cpm }},
  {{ $json.video_play_actions }},
  {{ $json.video_views_p25 }},
  {{ $json.video_views_p50 }},
  {{ $json.video_views_p75 }},
  {{ $json.video_views_p100 }},
  {{ $json.likes }},
  {{ $json.comments }},
  {{ $json.shares }},
  {{ $json.leads }},
  {{ $json.cost_per_lead !== null ? $json.cost_per_lead : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.actions_raw }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (tiktok_ad_id, date_start, date_stop, placement) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, tiktok_ad_id;

parameters.jsCode:
// No placement insights - pass through to Format Response
return [{ json: { _placementSkipped: true } }];
